creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Upstream issue [1] stipulates:

 You upgraded VirtualBox while your VM was in a saved state. You should NOT do that, ever. You now have two available options:

    Lose/discard the saved state. That will enable you to start the VM, but with some loss of information since the last boot/snapshot.
    Downgrade VirtualBox to the version that you upgraded from. That will allow you to restore the saved state, shut down the VM properly and then upgrade VirtualBox to its current version. 


[1] https://www.virtualbox.org/ticket/16350
